claim_bullets.bullet_text: Only a single Titan existed in the world, called The Great One or Creator of All Things, though their true nature is unknown (raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.280-285).
The world began with the death of this Titan, whose flesh became earth, breath became wind, and blood became seas (raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.280-285).
From the Titan's body, gods were born, including Myrii, Cha Za, Rahda, Marfa, Phalaris, and Pharis (raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.280-285).

source_record_text: This page summarizes the Guide to Forcelia & Alecrast section from Sword World RPG - Complete Edition (pages 280-285). It outlines the history of the world, its political and social structure, and its geography.
